message:
test(lean): add PR-scoped smoke gate and ladder rule traceability tests

lean_ci_verification_profiles.rs:
- Add lean_smoke_gate_is_pr_scoped_and_profile_driven test asserting
  that the CI workflow contains the required Lean smoke gate contract:
  PR-scoped trigger, smoke profile selection, command execution step,
  artifact upload step, and artifact name convention

lean_theorem_rule_traceability.rs:
- Add progress_and_canonical_ladder_rules_are_trace_linked test that
  cross-validates 13 required (rule_id, theorem) pairs across the
  cancel ladder (cancelMasked through cancelComplete), close ladder
  (closeBegin through close), and obligation lifecycle (reserve,
  commit, abort, leak) are all present in the traceability ledger
- Builds a rule_id -> Set<theorem> index from the ledger and asserts
  each canonical pair exists, acting as a regression gate for
  proof-rule linkage completeness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
